what_changed: Clarified README and docs/v1-requirements-matrix.md so the post-#505 27-artifact strict bundle is described as the latest validated snapshot, not as an always-current bundle after every traceability-only PR.
Documented that traceability-only PR evidence added after that snapshot must be included in the next publication bundle refresh.
Updated governance tests that pin the release-readiness wording and added this PR's own traceability sidecar.
why: PR #507 added traceability-only evidence after the post-#505 strict bundle refresh. Release docs should stay truthful about snapshot freshness without implying ignored databricks-runs bundle contents are committed or requiring a bundle rebuild after every sidecar-only PR.
